questions.question_text: Describe the process of the fixed-point iteration method. Using this method, determine the real root of the equation cosвҒЎвҖ“ 2рқ‘Ҙ+ 3 = 0 within the interval [1, 2] correct to three decimal places. 10 2
Find the approximate value for the real root of рқ‘Ҙlog10 рқ‘ҘвҲ’1.2 = 0 correct to five decimal places using the Newton-Raphson method. 10 2 CO Mapping

Explain the diagonally dominant system of equations. Find the solution to the system 6рқ‘Ҙ1 вҲ’рқ‘Ҙ2 + 2рқ‘Ҙ3 = 2 рқ‘Ҙ1 + 5рқ‘Ҙ2 + рқ‘Ҙ3 = 10 2рқ‘Ҙ1 + рқ‘Ҙ2 + 7рқ‘Ҙ3 = вҲ’3 by using the GaussвҖ“Seidel method upto five iterations. 10 3
